query:
-- Apollo actual hit rate: how many contacts have Apollo as source and have an email vs no email
SELECT 
  enrichmentSource,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR email = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) as email_hit_rate_pct
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource IN ('apollo', 'apollo_email', 'manual', 'linkedin', 'web_search')
GROUP BY enrichmentSource
ORDER BY total DESC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Apollo actual hit rate: how many contacts have Apollo as source and have an email vs no email
SELECT 
  enrichmentSource,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR email = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) as email_hit_rate_pct
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource IN ('apollo', 'apollo_email', 'manual', 'linkedin', 'web_search')
GROUP BY enrichmentSource
ORDER BY total DESC;
